3249180.name: Traveller's Hymn
3249180.description:
Traveller's Hymn is a top-down, grid-based, open-world adventure game. Explore, battle, and loot across the land. Talk to locals, solve their problems, and receive handsome rewards. Crumbs of the mystery behind The Valley's curse is scattered throughout the world, for you to find.

Features:

  • Hand-designed open world

  • Over 20 unique locations to explore

  • Over 100 varied enemies and NPCs

  • Over 100 varied items; including quest items, equipment, ingredients, and consumables

  • A hunger system where you must carefully decide when or what to eat

  • 4-5 hours of estimated content

Credits:

  • Aquatic Ranger Studio / @AquaticRangerGS

    • Programming: Lin He / @old_waah

    • Art: Zhengyi Wang / @ranger_wang

    • UI/UX: Mandy Hui /  @mandyyyuhui

  • Music:

    • Yubatake - JRPGCollection

    • Onys - Tranquility

    • Rolemusic - Leafless Quince Tree

    • Wolfgang_ - RPGBattleTheme

    • Aureolus_Omicron - 15 melodic rpg chiptunes

    • SubspaceAudio - sound effect
